title: TeamManifest
description: A repo-level team manifest. Lists the role agents this repo expects so a developer cloning it can hire the same team in one click. Lives at <repo>/.squad/team.json — versioned alongside the code.

version.description: Schema version. Bump only on breaking changes.

agents.description: Roles this repo's team needs. Order is the suggested hire order.

name.description: Override the default name. Empty string or omitted = use the role's built-in name.

color.description: Override the default avatar color. Squad palette id or hex.

note.description: Optional free-text note from whoever wrote the manifest — onboarding tips, contact, etc.
